abilities.name: Abyssal Depth
abilities.details: Marinus gains bonus [ap]magic penetration[/] based on her [mp]maximum mana[/]. A percentage of Marinus's bonus [ap]magical power[/] is converted into [mp]maximum mana[/].

abilities.name: Hydro Pump
abilities.details: Marinus channels a high-pressure beam of water in a straight line that impacts the first enemy hit, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) every 0.25 seconds.[n]While casting, Marinus cannot use any other ability and her movement speed (rotation speed as well) will be greatly reduced. This ability can be held down to continue the blast, rapidly consuming her [mp]mana[/] per second.

abilities.name: Enveloping Mists
abilities.details: Marinus surrounds herself with a layer of mist, gaining a [sh]shield[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) for a few seconds.[n]While <b>Envveloping Mists[/] is active, Marinus's mana regeneration speed is [bf]increased[/].

abilities.name: Tidal Surge
abilities.details: Marinus sends a crashing tidal wave in a target direction, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) to all enemies hit and [db]slowing[/] them for a short duration.

abilities.name: Swirling Vortex
abilities.details: Marinus creates a swirling vortex at a target location, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [mp]maximum mana[/]) per second too all enemies on top, [db]slowing[/] them and constantly [db]pulls[/] them toward its center.
